what: Gather vault context (name, type, existing categories, sample titles) from the database for LLM prompt construction
why: The LLM needs to understand the vault's existing structure and naming conventions to generate knowledge entries that fit naturally alongside existing content

output.console: Vault context object with name, type, up to 10 categories, and up to 5 sample titles

success_handling.criteria: Vault exists in the database and context is assembled with vault name, vault type, existing categories (up to 10), and sample titles (up to 5 from most recent entries)

error_handling.criteria: No row returned from SELECT on vaults table for the given vault_id
error_handling.action: Return VAULT_NOT_FOUND error — the vault must exist before AI generation can run

decisions.outcome: Proceed to call-llm step with vault context
